use_cases: Creating Matrix-style digital rain effects with falling characters
Cyberpunk or sci-fi themed visual decorations
Dynamic character-based loading or ambient animations
Tech-focused visual effects for landing pages or dashboards
ai_summary: A Matrix-style ripple effect component that renders a grid of characters with interactive hover responses. Features customizable viewing angles, font properties, and text colors. Creates a digital rain effect by calculating pixel weights of characters and animating based on hover state. Perfect for cyberpunk-themed UI elements, ambient backgrounds, or tech-focused visual decorations.
